themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "As well the singers as the players on instruments shall be there: all my springs are in thee....". Word-study detail reinforces "וְשָׁרִ֥ים: As well the singers - to sing".
